name: AutoFinIQ
description: Viz Cloud's flagship data intelligence platform — unifying ETL pipelines, AI-driven analytics, and Power BI reporting to eliminate manual financial workflows. AutoFinIQ transforms fragmented data across SQL Server, Oracle, AWS S3, Snowflake, and Excel into real-time, governed, predictive intelligence.
image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'%3E%3Crect width='200' height='200' fill='%23182d4d'/%3E%3Crect x='40' y='80' width='12' height='50' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Crect x='60' y='60' width='12' height='70' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Crect x='80' y='40' width='12' height='90' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Crect x='100' y='50' width='12' height='80' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Crect x='120' y='70' width='12' height='60' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3Crect x='140' y='90' width='12' height='40' fill='%2322d3ee'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
capabilities: Smart ETL Engine: Python + Apache Airflow DAGs extracting from 8+ sources with AI-assisted validation and automated error handling.
Generative AI Insights: LLM-powered NL-to-SQL queries and automated narrative report generation for non-technical finance stakeholders.
Predictive Dashboards: Power BI with ML-driven KPI forecasts, anomaly detection, and real-time refresh from Snowflake and AWS Redshift.
Governance & Compliance: Full data lineage, SOX-compliant audit trails, and role-based access controls.

pricing.features: On-premises/hybrid, custom AI models, SLA guarantee
